notes:
v2.5.3 Update
🖼️ Compact portrait fix: Collapsed portraits no longer inherit expanded portrait X/Y/Scale values when compact-specific portrait values are empty.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.3
announcement.content:
v2.5.3 fixes compact portrait offset inheritance.

  • Compact portrait fix: Normal portrait X/Y/Scale no longer shifts collapsed portraits when compact-specific portrait values are empty.
